## Quality Check

- [ ] Change is the smallest coherent implementation I could make
- [ ] I did not add decorative comments or generated prose walls
- [ ] I did not leave commented-out dead code behind
- [ ] I did not add an unverified fallback path without documenting why it exists
- [ ] I did not introduce a competing side-path for an existing runtime behavior
- [ ] New or restored behavior is either runtime-wired or explicitly marked experimental / unsupported
